variants.text: Wondering why the front door is locked? Well, the more people stay, the more money I get. That's power hour rules.

options.text: [Push Back] I just need to leave.
[Listen] What do you want from me?

offer.text: You've caused quite a stir tonight, kid. Relax. The night is young. Have a drink with me before you head out into the cold.

options.text: [Decline Drink] No thanks, I'm in a hurry.

drinkBranch.text: Everything went fuzzy. You woke up at 3:00 AM on the office sofa. The deadline is gone. You failed.

jobBranch.text: Direct. I like that. Honestly, I usually keep that bottle for stupid people. Hmm... I do need a Floor Manager. Join me.

options.text: [Decline Job] No. I have to graduate.

averageEnding.text: You become the new Floor Manager. You have money, but your degree is abandoned.

successEnding.text: The Owner respects the hustle and hands you the keys. You burst out the doors.
